promoted_facts.fact: Call center is mandatory at $1,800/month via Red Valley Staffing
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 8, page 19

promoted_facts.fact: Reciprocity policy requires accepting members from other studios at reduced rates with no reimbursement
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass D / Item 16, page 37

promoted_facts.fact: Quality assurance audit score below 90 = default; 2 scores below 90 in 12 months = termination right
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, pages 26

promoted_facts.fact: Development time 5-12 months typical; 300-day deadline in FA; must meet pre-opening sales requirements
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, page 25

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisee may not conduct business or advertise on Internet without written authorization
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass D / Item 12, page 32

promoted_facts.fact: Royalty begins at earlier of studio opening or opening deadline (pay even if not open on time)

promoted_facts.fact: Note 4 in financials shows 21 franchised outlets vs Item 20 showing 17 — likely because officer-owned studios counted differently

promoted_facts.fact: Franchise fees receivable is net of $945K fees owed offset by $756K commissions to same party — broker arrangement

promoted_facts.fact: FIT Radio music streaming at $147/month is mandatory

promoted_facts.fact: Limitation of actions: claims must be commenced within 1 year of discovery
